messages.content:
Movavi’s goal for its video editing software is to enable simple movie and clip creation, avoiding the sometimes needless complexity of the competition. That sounds great, but does it pan out in practice? After all, creating compelling videos often requires advanced tools and capabilities. You also want a responsive program that renders the final product quickly. Luckily, Movavi Video Editor is one of the best apps we’ve seen at packing a lot of capability into an unintimidating interface.

Rephrase this text completely, keep the same ideas and make friendlier tone-of-voice.

Movavi wants their video editing software to make it easy for anyone to create movies and clips without overwhelming complexity. But does it actually work? After all, making great videos usually requires advanced tools and fast rendering. Thankfully, Movavi Video Editor is one of the best apps we've come across that combines a lot of features with a user-friendly interface.
Can you create a catchy question at the end of this paragraph that says smth like "it works both for macos and windows why dont we get to know more how it can solve your editing needs?"
Movavi Video Editor is not only user-friendly but also compatible with both macOS and Windows. So, why not delve deeper into how this versatile software can solve all your editing needs?

Can you make a small paragraph out of this info that will fit into the small section of "pros of the product"?

This mode enables you to create themed movies automatically in 5 steps:
Upload your files (photos and videos).
Pick a template: Family, Memories, Travel, Love story, and more. This choice will define the transitions, titles, and music you will have in your video. You can also choose the No transitions theme and adjust it to your liking.
Choose a soundtrack from the built-in collection or upload your file.
Preview your video. Insert text in the opening and closing titles, adjust slide duration, and fill the black bars.
Export the results: save in any format, share online, or continue editing in the manual mode.

One of the pros of Movavi Video Editor is its user-friendly Auto mode. With this feature, you can easily create themed movies in just five simple steps. First, upload your photos and videos. Then, choose from a variety of templates such as Family, Memories, Travel, Love story, or even create a customized theme. Next, select a soundtrack from the built-in collection or upload your own. Preview your video and make any necessary adjustments to the opening and closing titles, slide duration, and black bars. Finally, export your finished video in any desired format, share it online, or continue editing manually.
Rephrase it to make more fluent and appealing

Experience the convenience of Movavi Video Editor's Auto mode, a standout feature of this software. Create stunning themed movies effortlessly, with just five simple steps. Begin by uploading your collection of photos and videos. Then, choose from an array of engaging templates, including Family, Memories, Travel, and Love story, or unleash your creativity with a personalized theme. Enhance your creation by selecting a captivating soundtrack from the extensive built-in collection or import your own. Preview your video and add a personal touch by customizing the opening and closing titles, adjusting slide duration, and eliminating black bars. Finally, export your masterpiece in any desired format, easily share it online, or seamlessly continue editing manually. Let Movavi Video Editor simplify your editing journey and bring your visions to life.

Make me a short paragraph about "Manual mode"

Manual mode

The editing space is a multitrack where you can add up to 99 tracks for video, audio, and titles. The handy timeline marks the length of your video, and you can scale it up or down for more precise editing. Everything is done easily, thanks to the drag-and-drop controls.

You can see your results in the preview window, and you can adjust the quality of the video for the preview. You can also change the aspect ratio, enable guidelines for placing objects, or take screenshots.

Tabs

Import
You can upload files from your computer, record from a webcam, or capture microphone output. You can add the file directly on the multitrack or store them in Media Bin for later. Here, you will also find built-in content: sounds, music, videos, backgrounds, and effects packs.

Filters
There is a broad range of filters, including artistic effects, color filters, and adjustments. You can also use overlay effects with various blending modes and LUTs.

Transitions
You can join clips using dynamic or elegant fades to make the video flow smoothly.

Titles
You can use a template to create opening or closing credits, subtitles, or captions. You can also create an intro video and save the sample.

Stickers
The collection of stickers includes various themed clip-art objects.

Tools

Video Editing
Color adjustments: easy (automatic filters and LUTs) and advanced (manual settings)
Blade
Crop and rotate
Overlay
Pan and zoom
Stabilization
AI-powered motion tracking
AI background removal
Highlight and conceal
Chroma Key
Scene detection
Logo
Slow motion

Audio Editing
Synchronization (similar tracks from different devices)
Equalizer
AI noise removal
Audio effects
Beat detection
Sound autocorrect (enhanced voice recording; noisy place, recording studio)
Noise gate
Manual sound adjustment (sound compressor)
Reverberation

In Manual mode, Movavi Video Editor provides a versatile editing space with up to 99 tracks for video, audio, and titles. The intuitive timeline allows for precise editing by easily scaling and adjusting the length of your video. With drag-and-drop controls, the process becomes seamless. Preview your edits with the dedicated window, where you can also adjust the quality and aspect ratio, enable guidelines, and capture screenshots.

The Tabs in Manual mode further enhance your editing experience. In the Import tab, easily upload files, record from your webcam, or capture microphone output. You can add files directly to the multitrack or store them in the Media Bin for later use. Additionally, an array of built-in content, including sounds, music, videos, backgrounds, and effects packs, is available.

Explore a wide range of creative possibilities with the Filters tab, offering artistic effects, color filters, and adjustments. Overlay effects with various blending modes and LUTs open up new visual dimensions. Smoothly transition between clips using dynamic or elegant fades with the Transitions tab.

The Titles tab provides templates for creating opening and closing credits, subtitles, and captions. You can even design an intro video and save it as a sample. Add flair to your videos with the Stickers tab, featuring a collection of themed clip-art objects.

Engage with powerful tools in Video Editing, including easy color adjustments with automatic filters and LUTs, as well as advanced manual settings. The Blade function allows precise cutting, while the Crop and Rotate features provide flexibility. Other tools include Overlay, Pan and Zoom, Stabilization, AI-powered motion tracking, AI background removal, Highlight and Conceal, Chroma Key, Scene Detection, Logo insertion, and Slow motion.

Unleash your creativity in Audio Editing with features like synchronization for similar tracks from different devices, equalizer controls, AI noise removal, audio effects, beat detection, sound autocorrect, noise gate, manual sound adjustment with a compressor, and reverberation effects. 

With Manual mode in Movavi Video Editor, you have a comprehensive set of tools at your fingertips to craft professional-level videos and achieve your desired vision with ease.

In Manual mode, Movavi Video Editor offers a powerful editing space with up to 99 tracks for video, audio, and titles. With drag-and-drop controls and an intuitive timeline, precise editing is effortless. Explore a wide range of creative options with filters, transitions, titles, and stickers. Enhance your videos with tools like color adjustments, cropping, stabilization, motion tracking, and more. In audio editing, synchronize tracks, apply effects, and fine-tune audio settings. With Manual mode, unleash your creativity and craft professional-level videos with ease.

Export
You can save the results in any available format, including MP4, MOV, AVI, MP3, GIF, and more. You can also optimize the output for your device or upload the video to YouTube, Google Drive, Vimeo, or TikTok directly from within the program.

In addition, Movavi Video Editor provides a seamless export experience. Save your edited videos in a wide range of formats such as MP4, MOV, AVI, MP3, GIF, and many more. Optimize the output specifically for your device or directly upload your masterpiece to popular platforms like YouTube, Google Drive, Vimeo, or TikTok, all from within the program itself. Enjoy the flexibility and convenience of sharing your creations with the world hassle-free.

Rephrase each point into small sentences

Easy-to-understand user interface
Transitions with sound
Motion tracking and picture-in-picture tools
Chroma-key capability
Quick movie creation tool

- Movavi Video Editor features a user-friendly interface that is easy to understand.
- Enjoy the ability to add transitions with accompanying sound effects to enhance your videos.
- Take advantage of advanced tools like motion tracking and picture-in-picture to add dynamic elements to your content.
- With the chroma-key capability, you can effortlessly remove or replace backgrounds in your videos.
- Movavi Video Editor offers a quick movie creation tool, allowing you to swiftly create compelling videos with ease.

Rephrase each point into small sentences

Lacks advanced trim modes and clip pre-trimming
Slow Rendering: The software tends to get slightly slow when rendering heavy video files.
Limited Support: Movavi doesn’t support H.265.
Lack of Control: The video editor has limited control over some of the effects (e.g., title addition and editing).

- Movavi Video Editor does not offer advanced trim modes or clip pre-trimming options, which may limit precision in editing.
- Users may experience slightly slow rendering times when working with large or complex video files.
- Unfortunately, Movavi does not support the H.265 video format at this time.
- Some users may find that the video editor has limited control over certain effects, such as title addition and editing, which may restrict their creative options.
